title: How to get deltaNLL from discrete profiling

posts.name: Alexandre Nikitenko
posts.text:
Dear experts,
we use discrete profiling tool in combine.   While it is explain in User Guide how to get scans of parameter of interest, like mass, width and NS for the signal, we can´t find how to extract deltaNLL.
Could you explain, please.
Thanks, Sasha.
posts.cooked_html:
Dear experts,

we use discrete profiling tool in combine. While it is explain in User Guide how to get scans of parameter of interest, like mass, width and NS for the signal, we can´t find how to extract deltaNLL.

Could you explain, please.

Thanks, Sasha.

posts.name: Andrea Carlo Marini
posts.text:
Hi Sasha,
Do you mean
combine MultiDimFit [...]

?
See e.g.,

cms-analysis.github.io

Common statistical methods - Combine

cms-analysis.github.io

Parametric Models - Combine

Make sure that the discrete index is added as a discrete nuisance in the datacard.
Cheers,
-Andrea
